metadata.description: A method library of Agent Skills for AI-agent-driven work, organised by direction: coding (development-process discipline for coding agents — plan, build, gate) and ai-os (the headless AI assisting system — job archetypes, wiki onboarding and maintenance). Shared by interactive Claude Code / Cowork sessions and automated pipelines.

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Development-process skills for coding agents: agent-tiered-planning, design-direction-lock, implementation-discipline, adversarial-review — plan, build, and gate a change across a mixed-capability agent pool.

plugins.name: ai-os
plugins.description: Framework + Agent Skills for a headless AI assisting system over real folders: project-onboarding, wiki-onboarding, wiki-maintenance, user-onboarding.
